name: AGENTS.md Auto-Loader
description: Automatically discovers and loads AGENTS.md files from the project root to the current working directory, replicating codex's project-level instruction loading logic. Reads CWD from xbot's session_cwd directory (updated by Cd) to stay in sync with directory changes.
author: yihang

context_enrichers.name: agents-md
context_enrichers.description: Injects AGENTS.md instructions discovered from project root to CWD
